name: Diabetic Butter Mints
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the margarine, milk, and butter flavoring until fluffy.
2. Stir in the powdered sugar replacement until smooth.
3. Knead until the mixture is smooth and well combined.
4. Roll out into marble-sized balls.
5. Press the balls into a mold or flatten them slightly on wax paper.
Recipe makes 45 pieces (3 pieces per serving). For each piece:
- Low-fat milk calories: 1/3
- Sugar replacement calories: 56
